description: CompositionLight blue and deep blue striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with blue thread detailing at the hems, half buttoned placket, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, appliqué on the chest, and a vented hemFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUpdate your casual style with this polo neck T-shirt from probase. The reverse appliqué brand name on the upper left chest adds an element of interest to this tee. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3&rdquo , Shoulders-19"
